message:
fix(daemon): populate LogHistory for log search support

Logs were being streamed to WebSocket clients but not stored in LogHistory,
making the log search API return empty results. The dashboardLogSink now
writes to both LogStreamer (for real-time streaming) and LogHistory (for
historical search).

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
